template_data.headline_html: Five SAM.gov gaps that quietly disqualify you.

items.title: Annual renewal
items.sub: Expires 365 days from last renewal, not the calendar year

items.title: NAICS codes review
items.sub: Wrong codes = invisible to agencies searching for your services

items.title: Validation buffer
items.sub: Re-validation takes 7–10 days — don't wait on an active RFQ

items.title: Banking details
items.sub: Awards route to the bank on file, not what you tell the CO

items.title: Points of contact
items.sub: Government contacts whoever is listed — keep it current

template_data.image_headline: FIVE SAM GAPS THAT DISQUALIFY YOU
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout on dark navy background. Bold headline top: 'FIVE SAM GAPS THAT DISQUALIFY YOU' with orange warning icon. Left side: illustrated professional woman in blazer at laptop reviewing a federal portal. Right side: 5 checklist rows, each with a bold green checkmark and a short 2-3 word label — 'Annual Renewal', 'NAICS Codes', 'Validation Buffer', 'Bank Details', 'Contact Info'. Bottom stripe: white callout text 'Check yours before an RFQ lands.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
